nasb.text: Others fell on the rocky places, where they did not have much soil; and immediately they sprang up, because they had no depth of soil.

esv.text: Other seeds fell on rocky ground, where they did not have much soil, and immediately they sprang up, since they had no depth of soil,

cnv.text: 有的落在泥土不多的石地上，因為泥土不深，很快就長起來。

ccb.text: 有些落在石头地上，因为泥土不深，种子很快就发芽了，然而因为没有根，

csbs.text: 有些落在岩石地上，那里没有多少泥土，它们立刻就发芽了，因为土不深；
